jobs.title: Nanny
jobs.meta_description: Join us as a dedicated nanny in Espoo, Finland, supporting our family's child during after-school hours. Full-time position offering competitive salary and
jobs.description: We are seeking a dedicated nanny for our family in Espoo, Finland. This role involves assisting with homework, supervising children, cleaning rooms, and developing their personal skills. The position offers full-time work from 8 hours per day, primarily during the afternoon and evening shifts to accommodate your daughter's schedule. We provide a competitive salary of 1600 EUR inclusive of feeding. Our ideal candidate is proficient in English and excited about helping children learn new skills while maintaining a clean and nurturing environment. Please send your CV for consideration; we will be in touch with the most suitable candidates shortly.
what_we_expect: Assists in the development of children's personal skills
job_responsibilities: Teaching my daughter how to cook African dishes, culture, and assisting with assignments.
what_we_offer: Nanny nanny washing dresses, Cooking, cleaning, teaching my daughter how to cook African dishes, culture, and assisting with assignments.
A short description of your skills.

jobs.title: Barber-hairdresser, Salon Klipsi Oy, Nummela office, Vihti
jobs.meta_description: Join Salon Klipsi Oy, Nummela as a Barber-Hairdresser to enhance customer service and stay updated with the latest trends. Shifts available at various points
jobs.description: We are looking for reinforcements for the Nummelan Salon Klips team! Part-time positions are available, also in the gig work type where you can choose your shifts on yourself. Shifts are sometimes offered at other Salon Klips points too. You're a barber-hairdresser with some experience and a friendly smile who loves customer service. You want to develop and train and keep up with the latest technologies and fashion trends. We offer a comfortable workplace, good training opportunities, and career advancement. Send a free-form application and attach hair photos as an attachment for your application or link your social media account where you can admire your work samples. Apply now! The requirement is a degree in barber-hairdressing and fluent Finnish language skills.

jobs.title: Summer cook
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
jobs.meta_description: Neste Tuulos is seeking a Summer Cook at their Hämeenlinna office as a chef's helper. This role involves preparing food and dishes while adhering to health
jobs.description: Neste Tuulos, located in Hämeenlinna, Finland, is seeking a Summer Cook to join their team as a chef's helper. This role involves pre-preparing food, preparing la carte dishes, baking, setting up the buffet table, washing dishes and cleaning, all while adhering to food-related health, safety, hygiene, and other relevant legislation. The summer cook must be proficient in using cooking techniques, methods, and kitchen appliances, as well as storing food ingredients correctly. This is a fixed-term summer job from May 1st to September 30th, with the possibility of an extension upon negotiation. Working hours are between 7:00 AM and 4:30 PM, including weekends. The position requires a car for commuting due to the workplace's location along Highway 12 in Tuulos.
what_we_expect: Knows his job, is independent and professionally proud
Works in good cooperation with his partner in the kitchen
Neste Tuulos' service selection includes breakfast buffet, home-cooked lunch, evening buffet and a la carte dishes.
job_responsibilities: Preparing food and preparing buffet dishes
what_we_offer: Fixed-term summer job from May to September
Possible extension of working hours on weekends
Own car necessary for travel to work shifts
jobs.search_keywords: summer cook, chef's helper, pre-preparing food, preparing a la carte dishes, baking, setting up the buffet table, washing dishes and cleaning, fixed-term summer job, possible extension, own car, working hours on weekends, Neste Tuulos, breakfast buffet, lunch buffet, evening buffet, a la carte

jobs.title: Regular Assembler
jobs.salary_range: Salary in accordance with the collective agreem
jobs.meta_description: Join Eezy personnel services Oy as a Regular Assembler in Härmä! Full-time permanent position, high-quality assembly work with precision, quality standards
jobs.description: We are looking for a Regular Assembler in Härmä! This full-time permanent position requires high-quality assembly work with precision and commitment to quality standards. Duties include assembling large components, using cranes for moving and handling products, adhering to strict quality and safety standards, reading drawings, and working according to instructions. The ideal candidate will have a good ability to read drawings and visualize concepts, as well as a willingness to work in demanding production environments. We offer very high-quality training, a focus on investment in quality and competence, two shift options starting at €15/h with potential for up to €18/h based on skills accumulation. The role is ideal for someone who enjoys physical work and handling large pieces.
what_we_expect: Commitment to high quality and working according to instructions
Good ability to read drawings and conceptualize
Desire to work in a demanding production environment
Willingness for physical work and handling large pieces
job_responsibilities: Moving and handling products using cranes
Working according to exact quality and safety standards
Reading the drawings and working on them
what_we_offer: A work environment where real investment is made in quality, competence and people
At the beginning of the work in one shift (6.0014.30), in the future the possibility of two shifts
Salary in accordance with the collective agreement of the technology industry
As skills accumulate, the possibility of up to €18/h
jobs.search_keywords: assembly, crane, quality, safety, drawings, commitment, production environment, physical work

jobs.title: Building and land construction surveyor
jobs.meta_description: Join Geops Oy as a Surveyor in Lahti, Espoo, Helsinki, and Vantaa! Experience building and civil engineering tasks with Trimble equipment, proficient in 3D-Win
jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced building and civil engineering surveyor in the Lahti, Uusimaa, Espoo, and Helsinki areas. The ideal candidate should have at least three years of experience in measurement tasks, be proficient with Trimble equipment, possess 3D-Win and AutoCAD skills, and demonstrate an independent and responsible work approach. Our team is committed to providing a stable job environment, fair compensation, professional development opportunities, comprehensive occupational health care benefits, exercise, cultural events, massage services, and competitive salaries based on experience plus bonuses. Interested candidates are encouraged to contact Jussi Heikkilä at 044 378 6495 or visit geops.fi for more information by calling or submitting an application via email.
what_we_expect: At least 3 years of experience in measurement tasks
job_responsibilities: At least 3 years of experience in measurement tasks
what_we_offer: A stable job and a fair atmosphere
The opportunity to influence your own job description and develop as a professional
A small, competent and approachable team

jobs.meta_description: Join Biomed Oy as a Marketing Coordinator in Helsinki! A versatile position combining practical work with innovative campaign development. Competitive
jobs.description: Biomed Oy is seeking a marketing coordinator with experience in digital marketing techniques, specifically focusing on paid advertising and e-commerce campaigns. The ideal candidate reports to the marketing manager and works alongside graphic designers, web developers, service providers, and other partners to develop and optimize websites, online stores, and digital marketing strategies for their growing business. This role offers a versatile position that combines practical work with innovative campaign development, while also providing opportunities for growth within a dynamic company culture. The compensation is competitive based on Finnish collective agreements, and the team values self-initiated work, systematization, and independent project management skills.

Develop Biomed's website from a marketing point of view

jobs.title: Mover (B/C driver's license)
jobs.company: Muutto- Ja Siivouspalvelu Reipas Oy, Järvenpää
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
jobs.meta_description: Join Muutto- Ja Siivouspalvelu Reipas Oy as a Mover (B/C driver's license) in the Itäkeskus area! Reliable Movers with B or C licenses needed for furniture
jobs.description: We are looking for a reliable mover with a B or C driver’s license to join our team in the Itäkeskus area. This role involves carrying furniture and loading/unloading moving loads while driving. We require good physical condition, initiative, and teamwork skills. Knowledge of the Finnish language is essential as it will be part of customer service interactions. Previous experience in moving services is preferred but not mandatory. The majority of work takes place in the Itäkeskus area. To apply, send your application by email to siivousreipas@gmail.com, attaching a CV if available. Please ensure that your message includes brief details about yourself, previous work experience, and driver’s license information.
jobs.search_keywords: moving, mover, B/C driver's license, Finnish language, physical condition, reliability, punctuality
